title: Sales Executive
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

  • Develop new account locally and overseas

  • Manage existing account assigned by team leader

  • Provide market information and feedback on customers

  • Visit customers locally and overseas

  • Cross sell all products

  • Prepare weekly report on daily activities

  • Prepare bi-monthly sales pipeline report

  • Work with PIC & team leader on all enquires

  • Contribute to Gas group report

  • Attending to sales enquiries and quotations

  • Source new products for customer’s enquiries

  • Follow up on orders and delivery 

  • Country in charge for SSBVN prepare bi-monthly group report & weekly report to discuss with Key account manager.

  • Other ad-hoc duties assigned

Requirements

  • Minimum diploma in business management, marketing, or related fields

  • At least 3 years of sales experience, with a proven track record of achieving or exceeding sales targets.

  • Strong interpersonal skills and ability to build relationships.

  • Excellent communication and presentation skills.

  • Proactive in identifying and pursuing sales opportunities.

  • Ability to work independently and effectively manage multiple priorities

  • Willing to travel overseas

  • Singaporean only may apply

Benefits

  • Annual Wage Supplement (AWS)

  • Variable Bonus

  • Outpatient Medical 

  • Transport Allowance

  • Travel Allowance

postedCompany.description:
SING SWEE BEE ENTERPRISE PTE LTD was set up in 1978. Its primary activity was in general export business. Since then, The Company is involved in trading of industrial gases and related products in Singapore and East Malaysia markets.

Over the years, the Company has consolidated its position in the market. This is achieved by securing a list of overseas agencies and expanding the customer base to Asian countries as well as other parts of the world. In 1992, Sing Swee Bee enterprise Pte Ltd was incorporated to reinforce its focus on quality improvement of products and to create a corporate image, in view of the expansion, the company is relocated to our company-owned premises at No.6 Attap Valley Road, Singapore 759906, in order to house the activities under one roof.

Today, our company is proud to establish ourselves as one of the major stockist of gas cylinders in S.E.ASIA and also a leading supplier of refrigerants in Singapore. In addition, the company was awarded with the ISO 9001 certification in 2000, for our excellent products quality and outstanding service. In the years to come, with our sound management and infrastructure base, we hope to be the main supplier of related products to many industries.
postedCompany.name: SING SWEE BEE ENTERPRISE PTE LTD
